paper_title: GLM: General language model pretraining with autoregressive blank infilling

extraction_data.innovation: GLM introduces a novel approach to pre-training language models by leveraging autoregressive blank infilling. This method enhances the generalizability of models across diverse downstream tasks.
extraction_data.extension: GLM is based on transformer architecture but adds a unique autoregressive blank infilling objective during pre-training. It does not add any new layers or weights compared to standard transformers like BERT or T5.
